zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey de Staunton於1302年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親William de Staunton36歲，母親Elizabeth Joan De Breedon32歲。他於大約1318年與Margery Stratton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1327年在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列為sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire。他去世於1369年10月13日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey de Staunton于1302年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲William de Staunton36岁，母亲Elizabeth Joan De Breedon32岁。他于大约1318年与Margery Stratton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1327年在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列为sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire。他去世于1369年10月13日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey de Staunton was born in 1302, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Staunton, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, was 32. He married Margery Stratton about 1318. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1327, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. He died on 13 October 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey de Staunton est né en 1302, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Staunton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery Stratton environ 1318. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1327, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey de Staunton 1302 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Staunton 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Joan De Breedon 32. Er hat um 1318 Margery Stratton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1327, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1369 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey de Staunton è nato il nel 1302 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Staunton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margery Stratton circa 1318. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1327, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. Morì il 13 ottobre 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Stauntonが1302年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父William de Stauntonは36歳，母Elizabeth Joan De Breedonは32歳であった。約1318年にMargery Strattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1327年，25歳の時，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでの職業はsheriff of nottingham & derbyshireと記録されている。彼は1369年10月13日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴 인 테 발
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Staunton(이)가 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Staunton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Joan De Breedon(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1318년 Margery Stratton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1327년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire이었다. 그는 1369년 10월 13일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Weston Longville, Broadland, Norfolk, En: Weston Longville, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: Staunton in the Vale, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey de Staunton nasceu em 1302, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Staunton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Stratton aproximadamente 1318. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1327, com 25 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: стаунтон ин т веил, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey de Staunton родился в 1302 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Staunton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Stratton около 1318 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1327 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он умер 13 октября 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Weston Longville, Broadland, Norfolk, En: Weston Longville, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: Staunton in the Vale, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Geoffrey de Staunton nació en 1302, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Staunton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Joan De Breedon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Stratton aproximadamente 1318. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1327, a la edad de 25 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of nottingham & derbyshire en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
